Description
net.sourceforge.plantuml
Contains classes for processing PlantUML source files.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.core
 
net.sourceforge.plantuml.preproc
Provides classes used to manage Preprocessing of PlantUML input.
net.sourceforge.plantuml.skin
Provides classes used to manage Skin and Skinparameter.

    Method parameters in net.sourceforge.plantuml.core with type arguments of type Warning
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static TextBlock
    DiagramChromeFactory12026.create(TextBlock raw, Annotated annotated, ISkinParam skinParam, StringBounder stringBounder, Collection<Warning> warnings)
    Takes a raw diagram TextBlock and wraps it with all the chrome elements found in the given annotated source (warnings, mainframe, legend, title, caption, header, footer).
